message:
fix(storage): document SQLite-only API and make FindAllDatabases backend-aware

Addresses leaky abstraction where beads.go creates sqlite.New directly,
bypassing backend configuration. Changes:

- Document that NewSQLiteStorage explicitly uses SQLite regardless of config
- Add GetConfiguredBackend helper to read backend type from metadata.json
- Make FindAllDatabases check backend before trying to open database,
  avoiding incorrect SQLite usage on Dolt-configured directories

Closes: bd-7cjc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecat
